subject: [DCAE] Revise components version
commit_message:
[DCAE] Revise components version

Python3.8 Support
- dcae-config-binding-service
- dcaemod-distributor-api
- dcaemod-onboarding-api

Java11
- dcae-dashboard
- dcae-inventory-api

Other Enahancement/Bug fixes
- dcae-dashboard
- dcae-deployment-handler

Patch Set 2:

> Patch Set 2:
> 
> Looks like bug in deployment handler, created jira issue - https://jira.onap.org/browse/DCAEGEN2-2452

Thanks. Btw, if the deployments are done using dashboardAPI, this tenant setting in DH is not explicitly required (Dashboard was updated to include this for Guilin).

As CLAMP also DH interface directly, fix should be done and included.

Patch Set 2:

marking this WIP until new DH container with fix is released
